updater.networkTimeout: Network timeout, unable to connect to GitHub
updater.noUpdateAvailable: No update available (release not published or server unreachable)
updater.noUpdateConfig: Portable build does not support online updates. Please visit GitHub Releases to download the latest version.
updater.downloadFailed: Download failed — please try manual download.
updater.downloaded: Download complete. Click to install and restart.
updater.unsignedMacBuild: Auto-update is not available on unsigned macOS builds. Please download the latest version from GitHub Releases and manually replace the app.

gateway.title: Choose Gateway Mode
gateway.localDesc: Run the embedded OhMyAgent server on this computer
gateway.remoteDesc: Connect to an OhMyAgent instance on another device
gateway.tokenPlaceholder: Look up token from remote .env file or startup log

error.portInUse: Port {{port}} is already in use. Please stop the process using this port and try again.
error.connectionFailed: Cannot reach remote gateway. Check the address and network connection.
error.tokenInvalid: Token invalid or expired. Please re-enter your auth token.
error.pageLoadTimeout: Page load timed out — remote gateway is responding too slowly.
